entry.data:
PARTLY SUNNY THIS MORNING, THEN CLEARING
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 10 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHEAST IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
NORTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A 50 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 40S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S

MOSTLY SUNNY WITH A 40 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
